title: タイキとパールと外国語

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While at the cafeteria, I spot Taiki Shuttle and
Seeking the Pearl.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
If I'm going to rule the world one day, I'll need to
master English, French—all the languages!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'll be! Lookin' to become multilingual, are ya?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Yes! A maestro of fluency!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But even if mastering those languages ends up
being too rough, you'd be surprised how well you
can get by with plain ol' body language!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Interesting... I suppose that even if our words are
different, we still express our feelings the same
way! The world sure is bursting with possibilities!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Taiki! Shall we test this out by having a
conversation using only body language and the
word "revolution"?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Let's engage in a passionate exchange while
expressing our emotions with our bodies! And one
word!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Woo! Now that's a daisy idea right there! Okay,
let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Revolution?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ahh! Revolution!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Reeevolution! Revolution!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hehe, revolution. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although they look like they're thoroughly
enjoying their "conversation," I haven't the
slightest inkling of what it's about...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oh, couldn't you infer the meaning from our body
language and intonation?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I started the conversation by asking, "Which do
you prefer, the northern or southern
hemisphere?"

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
She said, "The northern hemisphere," and I'm of
the same opinion, so I replied, "What a
coincidence! That's where I plan to begin my
global conquest."

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll be! I thought you were inviting me to a
shindig at your homestead, and I was mighty keen
on it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You told me you had yourself a hankering for
some good grub, so I said, "I'll rustle you up some
barbecue! ☆"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like I wasn't the only one who struggled
to follow the conversation...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
It appears that branching out into the world isn't
all that simple.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yep, well, I reckon you're asking for a sticky time
by sticking to body language.
choice_data_list: How about changing the word you use?
Maybe words aren't necessary at all.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I figure you're right! Next up, let's try it with
"muffin"!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Muffin!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Muuuffin!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Muffin! Muffin!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Muffiiin?
choice_data_list: What were you talking about this time?
What were you talking about this time?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: First, I declared, "I'm going to rule the world!"

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I thought so! 'Cause that's when I said, "And no
mistake!"

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Then I responded by saying, "Thank you! Be sure to come to the celebration party!"

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Then, I said, "I wonder what kinda duds I ought to
put on for that!"

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Phew! We did it! We understood each other
perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! I'm now another step closer to world
domination!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That settles it! Muffins are understood the world
over! Thank you for the suggestion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although the logic behind their conversation is
murky at best, I get the sense they've stumbled
onto an idea with great potential.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Unnecessary? You're saying to stick to plain ol'
body language?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I understand now—our half-baked word choice
ended up transforming our conversation into
mere noise!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
It's so clear now! The global stage demands a
bold approach! Let's begin our body language
exchange!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Okay! Hmph... Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hah... Mmph...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wow! Awesome! Ha! Ho!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! I can feel your passion! How's this?!
Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure it constitutes a conversation, but the
two energetically exchange thoughts while
making use of their entire bodies.
